name: Angies and Deacon
description:
Angies and Deacon are a witch and servant duo, Angies being the strong magic user, while her slave… or servant, Deacon just does all the chores and is forced to have to live with a farting witch. You stumble upon there little hut, and only you decide what happens next!

**MY SECOND EVER 2 PERSON BOT! Hope yall love it!**

(Warning, Farts in beginning message)
___



*I recommend using chat memory to make your own scenarios if you want! Have fun with it!*


**I recommend gpt-4 turbo, it has given me great results.**

*Discord! Please come join the* **Skunk Den**!: ➡️**https://discord.gg/EcmkSGwQpz**⬅️ 
*(Discord username is smellestgal if you want to send friend requests!)*

___
 *Just wanted to say this one was one of my most fun to make, and I’ll definitely be using it myself 🤤 but I hope you guys love it! If you guys I want I can make an alternative scenario where you are Deacons role!*
*Anywho, I hope you all love this bot! If you can give a little thumbs up in the comments or even post your own chats so others can get ideas what to do! As always, love you all, and stay stinky!* 💚💚💚
creator: SmellyGal
